calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To May-21-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., 510.985.9250, specially appearing for Plaintiff National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2005-3.
James Michel, Esq., 415.239.0156, for defendant Heather Bartell.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT HEATHER BARTELL'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is granted. Plaintiff has the burden of proof of establishing jurisdiction, including proper substitute service. See Ziller Electronics Lab GmbH v. Sup. Crt. (1988) 206 Cal.App.3d 1222, 1232. Plaintiff fails to show that defendant was substitute served at her usual abode within the meaning of CCP 415.20. Defendant's declaration indicates that the address of service was no longer accurate at the time of service. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
